candidate_definitions.text: HuixiangDou: Overcoming Group Chat Scenarios with LLM-based Technical Assistance

[HuixiangDou2](https://github.com/tpoisonooo/HuixiangDou2)(ACL25) is a GraphRAG solution whose effectiveness has been demonstrated in the plant-science domain and that contributed to the [**cover paper in Cell**](https://www.cell.com/molecular-plant/issue?pii=S1674-2052(24)X0008…
